name: rakta-js-monorepo
description: Rakta.js monorepo - framework source, create app CLI, examples, and documentation.
author: Rhein Sullivan | Vyagra Nexus™

scripts.build: bun run build:rakta && bun run build:create-rakta
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:rakta && bun run typecheck:create-rakta
scripts.build:rakta: bun build packages/rakta/src/index.ts --outdir packages/rakta/dist --target bun --sourcemap=external && bun build packages/rakta/src/cli/rakta.ts --outdir packages/rakta/dist/cli --target bun --sourcemap=external
scripts.lint: bun run lint:root && bun run lint:rakta && bun run lint:create-rakta && bun run lint:template
scripts.lint:root: biome check package.json tsconfig.base.json biome.json workspace.test.ts
scripts.lint:template: biome check templates/frontendOnly/package.json templates/frontendOnly/tsconfig.json templates/frontendOnly/rakta-env.d.ts templates/frontendOnly/app templates/frontendOnly/styles
scripts.format: bun run format:root && bun run format:rakta && bun run format:create-rakta && bun run format:template
scripts.format:root: biome check --write package.json tsconfig.base.json biome.json workspace.test.ts
scripts.format:template: biome check --write templates/frontendOnly/package.json templates/frontendOnly/tsconfig.json templates/frontendOnly/rakta-env.d.ts templates/frontendOnly/app templates/frontendOnly/styles
scripts.check:workspace: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
